bullets: Closes a hook bypass: `python -c`, `python3 -c`, `bash -c`, `sh -c`, and `python <<EOF` writing to `.claude/settings.json` / `.claude/settings.local.json` are now blocked. Quoted/heredoc bodies were previously stripped before the existing rules could see the path.
New `claude-settings` entry in `detection-registry.json` is the single source of truth for the settings-path shape — reusable by future settings-aware hooks.
Out of scope (deferred until seen): ruby/perl/node interpreter bodies. Symlink redirection remains a documented gap.
